policy_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from the buildings sector by improving efficiency and retrofits.

parent_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from the buildings sector by improving efficiency and retrofits.
policy_statement: Benchmark 1.3 billion square feet of communitywide buildings by 2026.

parent_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from the buildings sector by improving efficiency and retrofits.
policy_statement: Retune 1.1 billion square feet of communitywide buildings by 2030.

parent_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from the buildings sector by improving efficiency and retrofits.
policy_statement: Retrofit 167,500 homes by 2030 to reduce energy costs 28%, prioritizing low- to moderate-income (LMI) homes.
Approach 2: Expand renewable energy generation, including solar installations on County and community buildings and participation in utility-scale renewable programs.

parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand renewable energy generation, including solar installations on County and community buildings and participation in utility-scale renewable programs.
policy_statement: Install 61,725 kW of solar energy by 2030 on County buildings, land, and water (equivalent to 7,498 homes’ electricity use for one year).

parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand renewable energy generation, including solar installations on County and community buildings and participation in utility-scale renewable programs.
policy_statement: Install 794,000 kW of solar energy by 2030 on commercial and residential buildings (equivalent to 104,014 homes’ electricity use for one year).

parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand renewable energy generation, including solar installations on County and community buildings and participation in utility-scale renewable programs.
policy_statement: Maximize participation in utility-scale renewable energy programs.
Approach 3: Build ultra-low energy buildings by reducing the energy use intensity of new buildings and making new County buildings ultra-low energy.

parent_statement: Approach 3: Build ultra-low energy buildings by reducing the energy use intensity of new buildings and making new County buildings ultra-low energy.
policy_statement: Reduce the energy use intensity of new buildings 20% by 2030 below 2020 levels.
Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption through mode shift, fleet electrification, community EV adoption, and operational emissions reductions at airport and port.

parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption through mode shift, fleet electrification, community EV adoption, and operational emissions reductions at airport and port.
policy_statement: Shift 10% of transportation mode away from single-occupant vehicles by 2030.

parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption through mode shift, fleet electrification, community EV adoption, and operational emissions reductions at airport and port.
policy_statement: Electrify the County fleet so that 80% of light vehicles and 50% of public transit buses are electric by 2030.

parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption through mode shift, fleet electrification, community EV adoption, and operational emissions reductions at airport and port.
policy_statement: Transition 30% of communitywide vehicles to electric power by 2030.

parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption through mode shift, fleet electrification, community EV adoption, and operational emissions reductions at airport and port.
policy_statement: Reduce greenhouse gas emissions from Miami International Airport operations by 50% and PortMiami operations by 25% by 2030.
Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces to increase canopy and habitat preservation and improve water quality outcomes.

parent_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces to increase canopy and habitat preservation and improve water quality outcomes.
policy_statement: Increase community-wide tree canopy to 30% coverage by 2030.

parent_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces to increase canopy and habitat preservation and improve water quality outcomes.
policy_statement: Ensure all County facilities within the Urban Development Boundary attain at least 30% average canopy coverage and all County facilities outside the UDB attain at least 50% average canopy coverage by 2030.

parent_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces to increase canopy and habitat preservation and improve water quality outcomes.
policy_statement: Reduce pollutant loads to surface waters (including Biscayne Bay) to facilitate recovery of seagrasses to historic levels.

parent_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces to increase canopy and habitat preservation and improve water quality outcomes.
policy_statement: Double the total non-wetland acreage of natural habitat in preservation.
Approach 6: Convert waste to energy by increasing electricity generation from wastewater cogeneration and increasing conversion of non-recycled garbage to energy while improving recycling quality.

parent_statement: Approach 6: Convert waste to energy by increasing electricity generation from wastewater cogeneration and increasing conversion of non-recycled garbage to energy while improving recycling quality.
policy_statement: Generate 48 GWh/year of electricity from cogeneration at wastewater plants by 2030.

parent_statement: Approach 6: Convert waste to energy by increasing electricity generation from wastewater cogeneration and increasing conversion of non-recycled garbage to energy while improving recycling quality.
policy_statement: Convert 50% of non-recycled garbage to energy by 2030.

parent_statement: Approach 6: Convert waste to energy by increasing electricity generation from wastewater cogeneration and increasing conversion of non-recycled garbage to energy while improving recycling quality.

Approach 7: Reduce waste and water use through per-capita landfill waste reduction and per-capita water consumption reduction by 2030.

parent_statement: Approach 7: Reduce waste and water use through per-capita landfill waste reduction and per-capita water consumption reduction by 2030.

parent_statement: Approach 7: Reduce waste and water use through per-capita landfill waste reduction and per-capita water consumption reduction by 2030.
policy_statement: Reduce water consumption per person by 30% by 2030.
Miami-Dade County committed to the international Race to Zero pledge to reduce GHG emissions 50% by 2030 (vs. 2019) and achieve net zero by 2050.
